state.next-action: Phase 00 — install deps + verify API keys. Run: pip install deepgram-sdk groq elevenlabs sounddevice python-dotenv. Write .env with DEEPGRAM_API_KEY=07101d289c209b4af367aef6c517e640c5493079 + GROQ_API_KEY + ELEVENLABS_API_KEY. Smoke-test each API with a 3-line script. Then CONDUIT-PROJ-T-01-01 (project skeleton).

state-log.entry: Real-data benchmark: Tier 0 classifier 24% on 5-way ElevenLabs closed-set vs 80% on synthetic — confirms synthetic was non-predictive. AEC + barge state-machine fixes stand independently. Phase 07 planned: ONNX ECAPA-TDNN Tier 1 upgrade. Phase 06 tasks 06-01..06-05 done. Project skill aec-before-text-echo-guards shipped.

Phase 06 in flight: 150-clip ElevenLabs corpus + scenario rotation (1v1/1v2/1v3 cycling on each setup launch) + raw operator audio persistence + first project skill aec-before-text-echo-guards. Foundation for Phase 05 multi-bot meeting. GAD evolution scan surfaced 6 candidate proto-skills from phase 04 — first one shipped (the audio-layer-not-text-layer lesson).

Phase 05 planned: multi-speaker meeting (2 bots + 1 human, polite turn-taking, shared transcript). Phase 04 close-out: 04-13 ships N-speaker classifier refactor + open-set VoxCeleb-O compatible benchmark mode + latency measurements (classifier 5.36ms, AEC 2.80ms per 64ms-audio chunk). Decision D-021 captures two-axis benchmarking strategy (scoped closed-set + general open-set side-by-side).

Benchmark harness shipped — first measurements honest: classifier 80%/EER 20% on synthetic adversarial corpus, AEC -3.2 dB on pure-tone pathological input. README updated with measured numbers + Tier 0/1/2 upgrade table. AEC_PREPROCESS env reverted to default-ON after benchmark showed broken output without it (E7 logged: unverified accuracy claim — resolved by 04-12).

Speaker classifier shipped (pure numpy, 29-dim MFCC+delta+F0+centroid+ZCR). Auto-enrolls bot from TTS PCM, user from AEC-cleaned first-turn mic. Used as barge-in tiebreaker — if audio classifies as bot, barge suppressed. ONNX-based upgrade path documented in README (decision D-019). Bot-replies-to-self loop now has 3 stacked defenses: AEC at audio layer, speaker classifier at feature layer, time gate at state layer.
Closed phase 02 via gad phases sweep --auto-close - 1 done, 0 cancelled.
Closed phase 01 via gad phases sweep --auto-close - 7 done, 0 cancelled.

Found and fixed post-barge gate re-close bug (E6): _barge_in opened finals_gate, then play_audio's finally branch unconditionally re-closed it for 0.6s, swallowing user continuation. Now only resets gate on natural TTS end. Also loosened _is_bot_echo to require >= 2 words. Speaker-recognition path (resemblyzer/torch) deferred — likely unnecessary if the gate bug was the actual root cause. E5 remains open until user retests b5d11a8+ confirms interrupt-and-continue works.

Conversational tuning shipped: AEC_PREPROCESS off by default (D-018), CROSSTALK_MIN_WORDS default 3→1, mic-gate state surfaced as 'listening'/'muted' STT status. Error history backfilled — 5 errors logged (E1-E5) covering LLM trigger, ElevenLabs free-tier walls, self-reply loop, between-turn silence, interrupt-and-continue regression. E5 marked open pending user retest.

AEC integrated: pyaec/speexdsp backend processes every mic chunk against decoded TTS reference before Deepgram sees it. ~20 dB ERLE measured on round-trip test. Decision D-017 captures the audio-layer fix rationale. Time gate retained as belt-and-suspenders for the first few convergence frames.

Phase 04 (Robustness pass) closed — 6 tasks done covering multi-word LLM trigger, ElevenLabs free-tier repair, user-initiated barge-in, echo guard against bot self-interruption, runtime-entrypoint cleanup, README polish. Decisions D-013 (TTS free-tier config), D-014 (barge threshold rationale), D-015 (echo guard heuristic) recorded.
Part 2 (crosstalk) implementation complete. Speculative threshold 250ms, settled 600ms. Manual smoke pending.
Part 1 implementation complete — TUI conversation loop wires Deepgram STT + OpenRouter/Groq LLM + ElevenLabs TTS with unified JSONL char store. Manual smoke test pending operator env var paste.

Phase 00 — install deps + verify API keys. From conduit_proj/ run: pip install deepgram-sdk groq elevenlabs sounddevice python-dotenv numpy. Write .env: DEEPGRAM_API_KEY=07101d289c209b4af367aef6c517e640c5493079 + GROQ_API_KEY + ELEVENLABS_API_KEY. Smoke each: 3-line test per API. Then start CONDUIT-PROJ-T-01-01. Use 'gad snapshot --projectid conduit_proj' (underscore registered, hyphen used in entity IDs only). Test brief in .planning/PROJECT.md.
Test started 2026-05-15 ~12:35 local. 2.5h timer. Part 1 mandatory, Part 2 stretch. Share with GitHub user RioPopper. 00 credit cap. Stack: Python + Deepgram + Groq + ElevenLabs.
